title: FanSafe Emergency Info
description: Emergency and non-emergency contact numbers for a single city pack. Mirrors the `emergency` object currently hardcoded per-city in FanSafe_PWA/index.html's `cityPacks` array. Not yet consumed at runtime — see docs/architecture.md Phase 2.

primary.description: The primary emergency number (e.g. '911', '112'). Must never be fabricated — see docs/content-governance.md.

secondaryLabel.description: Legacy label for a non-emergency number. New packs should use typed services entries instead.

secondary.description: Legacy non-emergency number or service. New packs should use a separately typed services entry.

sourceUrl.description: Official source URL for these numbers. Required by docs/content-governance.md for any non-demo pack; optional here so existing demo data can validate while it is still explicitly labeled sample data.

sourceAccessedOn.description: ISO date the sourceUrl was last checked.
